title: How to make Subitems IDs static or assigned
excerpt: I created an integration that maps subitems by their ids but when I test I get some errors because when a subitem is created the ID is not always constant. Is there a way around this?

posts.author: Bizanalysis (Chuka Iloegbunam)
posts.cookedHtml: I created an integration that maps subitems by their ids but when I test I get some errors because when a subitem is created the ID is not always constant. Is there a way around this?
